chunks.memory_unit_text: In the rtk-ai/rtk release v0.24.0, the project adds AWS CLI and psql modules with token-optimized output, a passthrough fallback when Clap parse fails, and SHA-256 hook integrity verification. Bug fixes include propagating exit codes in git push/pull/fetch/stash/worktree, fixing the Playwright JSON parser to match real output format, supporting additional git global options, and updating version refs to 0.23.0 with module count to 51.
